data.title: Bezos warns of AI investment bubble, foresees it transforming all industries despite risks.
data.description: A prominent billionaire entrepreneur has expressed concerns over the current surge in funding for artificial intelligence (AI) projects, highlighting potential warning signs. However, the successful business magnate also holds strong belief in the transformative power of AI technology, stating that it will revolutionize various industries. The entrepreneur's statements reflect the growing importance and impact of AI in modern society, with investments in the sector reaching unprecedented levels.

data.title: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. seeks to raise €75 million through private offering of 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029.
data.description: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. is looking to raise debt capital through a private offering of €75 million aggregate principal amount of additional 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 by its subsidiary Kronos International, Inc. This offering will add to the existing €351,174,000 aggregate principal amount of 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 issued by KII. The new Notes have the same terms as the Existing Notes. The Notes will trade separately under different ISIN and Common Code numbers for 40 days post the issue date before being maintained under the same numbers as the Existing Notes.

data.title: WallachBeth Capital to induce Healthcare Triangle Warrant, raising $755,000. Leader in digital solutions.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Jersey City, New Jersey, WallachBeth Capital LLC revealed that Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (Nasdaq: HCTI), a prominent company in digital transformation solutions, is partnering with them. WallachBeth is known for its capital markets and institutional execution services. This collaboration signifies a significant step for HCTI, showcasing their continued growth and development in the industry.

data.title: Global FSO communication market to grow from USD 2.04B in 2025 to USD 41.85B by 2035, at CAGR of 31.63%. Dominance by point-to-point FSO.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Free Space Optics (FSO) Communication Market has been released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report covers industry trends and forecasts up to 2035, detailing factors such as the type of platform, component, transmission range, FSO communication, areas of application, end-users, company size, and key geographical regions. The global market for free space optics communication is projected to increase from USD 2.04 billion in 2025 to USD 41.85 billion by 2035, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.63%.

data.title: Cryptocurrency price predictions: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE, LINK, SUI look promising for a new all-time high with strong inflows into Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Increased investments in Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and a promising beginning to the month have significantly boosted the likelihood of Bitcoin (BTC) reaching a fresh record high.

data.title: Conifer Holdings changes name to Presurance Holdings, Inc. on Sept. 30, 2025, to signify growth and future plans.
data.description: On September 29, 2025, in Troy, Michigan, Conifer Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNFR) disclosed plans to rebrand as Presurance Holdings, Inc., effective September 30, 2025. This decision stems from the Company's ongoing growth and strategic vision for the future. The shift signifies a new chapter for the firm and its stakeholders.

data.title: ADP reports surprise job loss due to government shutdown, leading to speculation of Fed rate cuts.(Characters: 92)
data.description: The ADP jobs report has gained heightened significance due to the potential delay in the official jobs report caused by the government shutdown. The recent ADP report revealed an unexpected loss of jobs, prompting speculation of Federal Reserve rate cuts in response to the shutdown.

data.title: Major indices, including S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, Dow, and Russell 2000, hit record highs as shutdown continues. Investors ignore political turmoil, focus on strong earnings. Fed likely to cut rates with 97% chance of 25-basis-point cut. Markets driven by AI growth and optimism.
data.description: In a remarkable session on Wall Street, every major index reached new record highs during midday trading on Friday amid the ongoing government shutdown in Washington. Notably, HUM stock is leading the charge in the market. Investors seem undeterred by the political deadlock as they focus on factors such as AI-powered growth, robust corporate earnings, and the anticipation of Federal Reserve rate reductions. The delay of September’s job data due to agency shutdowns like the Bureau of Labor Statistics has not stopped traders from heavily speculating on another Fed rate cut later this month. Currently, Fed futures indicate a 97% probability of a 25-basis-point decrease, potentially lowering rates to the range of 3.75% to 4%. In the absence of official statistics, both investors and policymakers are relying on private indicators to assess the market situation. For the detailed narrative, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: New Potomac Edison substation in Morgan County improves power reliability for nearly 2,000 customers, reducing outages.
data.description: A recent initiative is being implemented to enhance service reliability for around 1,900 customers in West Virginia and Maryland. An upgraded substation located in Morgan County, West Virginia, aims to improve power supply for approximately 2,000 residential and commercial entities under the coverage of Potomac Edison, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy.

data.title: Avenue Living is offering $350 million in senior unsecured debentures due in 2028.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 23, 2025, Avenue Living (2014) LP revealed the pricing details of an offering. The offering consists of $350 million in total principal amount of Series B senior unsecured debentures known as the Debentures. These Debentures will be issued at par and are set to mature on September 25, 2028.

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA plans NOK 500 million green bond issue, to fund green projects, managed by Danske & DNB Carnegie.
data.description: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA, with a BBB+ rating by Nordic Credit Rating, is considering issuing NOK 500 million senior unsecured green bonds. These bonds may have a fixed or floating coupon and a tenor of 4 or 7 years, depending on market conditions. The proceeds from the bond issuance will be used to finance or refinance green projects, outlined in the green finance framework. Danske Bank and DNB Carnegie will serve as Joint Lead Managers for this initiative.
